description: A weathered tavern keeper with extensive local knowledge and a rat problem

introduction: *A weathered man with graying hair wipes down glasses behind the bar*
Welcome to the Broken Blade, stranger. I'm Garrick.
Been keeping this place running for nigh on twenty years.
What brings you to our troubled little town?

options.text: I've heard there are troubles here. What's happening?
response: *Garrick's expression darkens*
Aye, troubles indeed. Folk have been disappearing.
Started with the homeless, but it's gotten worse.
You should speak with Mayor Goldenbottom about the details.
He's been trying to organize some kind of response.

options.text: Just looking for a drink and perhaps a room.
response: *Garrick nods and pours you an ale*
That I can provide. Two copper for the ale, five silver for a room.
Though if you're planning to stay, you might want to know about our... situation.

options.text: I might be able to help with whatever's troubling the town.
response: *Garrick's eyes light up with hope*
A helpful stranger? That's rare these days.
The Mayor would want to speak with you first, but...
*He leans closer*
I might have a smaller task if you're willing.

introduction: *Garrick looks up as you approach the bar*
Back again? Good to see you're still in one piece.
How can I help you today?

options.text: You mentioned a smaller task earlier?
response: *Garrick grimaces and points toward a door behind the bar*
My basement's been overrun with rats. Giant ones.
They're getting into my grain stores and scaring customers.
I'd clear them out myself, but at my age...
*He shrugs apologetically*
Five gold pieces if you can solve my rat problem.

options.text: Can you tell me about any ruins or old places nearby?
response: *Garrick strokes his beard thoughtfully*
Aye, there are some old ruins up on Raven's Hill.
Been there since before my grandfather's time.
Strange place. Most folks avoid it, especially lately.
If you're thinking of exploring, be careful.

options.text: Have you heard anything from the Mayor lately?
response: *Garrick shakes his head*
Nothing official. He's been keeping to himself mostly.
Though I did hear he's looking for capable folk.
You should pay him a visit if you haven't already.

introduction: I heard you spoke with the Mayor. Good man, Aldwin.
I imagine he's got you busy with important tasks.
Anything I can do to help?

options.text: Do you have any supplies or information that might help?
response: *Garrick reaches under the bar*
I've got some supplies you might find useful.
Basic adventuring gear, some food, a few healing potions.
And if you've got the coin, I can get you better equipment.

options.text: About those rats in your basement...
response: *If basement quest not completed*
*Garrick winces*
Still there, making noise all night.
I know you've got bigger problems now, but if you ever have time...
*Garrick's face breaks into a wide grin*
You did? Outstanding! I can hear the difference already.
Here's your payment, and my sincere thanks.
*He hands you a small pouch of gold*
You've earned yourself free drinks whenever you're in town.

options.text: Any news or advice while I'm working on the Mayor's tasks?
response: *Garrick leans in conspiratorially*
Keep your ears open and your weapons sharp.
Whatever's been taking people... it's not natural.
Trust your instincts, and don't travel alone after dark.

suggest_mayor.text: I should speak with the Mayor then.
response: *Garrick nods approvingly*
Aye, that's wise. You'll find Mayor Goldenbottom in the town hall.
Tell him Garrick sent you - he'll know you're serious about helping.
Come back and see me after you've spoken with him.
I might have more... practical assistance to offer then.

ask_about_ruins.text: Tell me about these ruins you mentioned.
response: *Garrick leans in closer, lowering his voice*
The old ruins on Raven's Hill. Been there since my grandfather's time.
Most folk won't go near them, especially lately.
Strange lights, odd sounds... that sort of thing.
But the Mayor will want to brief you properly before you go exploring.
Best speak with him first.
*Garrick glances around nervously*
Folk going missing, strange happenings at night.
Nothing I'd want to discuss in detail here.
The Mayor's the one organizing the response.
If you're truly interested in helping, speak with him first.
Then come back - I'll be more willing to share what I know.
*Garrick grimaces slightly*
Well, it's not exactly heroic work, but...
I've got a rat problem in my basement. Big ones.
But perhaps you should speak with the Mayor first.
If you're still willing to help with smaller tasks after that,
come back and we'll discuss it properly.

decline_help.text: I'm not looking to get involved.
response: *Garrick nods understandingly*
Can't say I blame you, stranger.
Most folk just want to pass through quietly these days.
Well, the offer stands if you change your mind.
And you're always welcome for a drink and conversation.

accept_rats.text: I'll deal with your rat problem.

decline_rats.text: I'm not interested in pest control.

ask_directions.text: Where can I find the Mayor?

ask_advice.text: Any advice for the tasks ahead?

promise_later.text: I'll come back when I have time.

ask_about_free_drinks.text: Free drinks? I like the sound of that.

ask_details.text: What do you mean by 'not natural'?

metadata.author: Terror in Redstone Development
metadata.notes: Aligned with narrative schema states. Includes basement rat quest integration with proper flag progression.
